title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Ujjivan Small Finance Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Ujjivan Small Finance Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Ujjivan Small Finance Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Ujjivan Small Finance Bank:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ujjivan Small Finance Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
